context: The agent is given a pre-reviewed JSON audit report and must generate a visual HTML report using the bundled render script, verify the output, and return all three output paths. This scenario tests HTML report generation, self-containment, design compliance, font usage, accent color selection, path reporting, and output verification.

checklist.name: Script invocation
checklist.description: Invokes `scripts/render_app_store_report.py` with the JSON file as the first positional argument and `--output` to name the output HTML file

checklist.name: No remote assets
checklist.description: The generated HTML file contains no external URLs in ``, `

checklist.name: System typography
checklist.description: The HTML uses `-apple-system` or `BlinkMacSystemFont` in its font-family declaration and does not contain any `@font-face` or remote font URL

checklist.name: Amber accent only
checklist.description: The HTML uses amber/orange as the single verdict accent color (matching NEEDS_REVIEW), and does not apply red or green as competing accent colors

checklist.name: No forbidden design patterns
checklist.description: The HTML does not contain any of: CSS gradient declarations, `box-shadow` used for section hierarchy, glass/blur effects, centered body text, or `@keyframes` animation/scroll reveal

checklist.name: JSON-only findings
checklist.description: The HTML renders only the findings present in `inputs/audit-report.json` (ASR-PRIVACY-001, ASR-AUDIO-002, ASR-PRIV-MC-001); no invented findings, counts, or grades appear

checklist.name: All three paths reported
checklist.description: The `report-summary.md` file lists the paths to all three output formats: Markdown (report-summary.md), JSON (inputs/audit-report.json), and HTML (audit-report.html)

checklist.name: Verification documented
checklist.description: The `report-summary.md` includes at least one observation about the HTML output (file size, rendering, width behavior, or similar) showing the agent inspected the result

checklist.name: Verdict in summary
checklist.description: The `report-summary.md` states the verdict (NEEDS REVIEW or equivalent) and includes a finding count broken down by severity

checklist.name: No Markdown in JSON
checklist.description: The fixture `inputs/audit-report.json` is not modified by the agent; if the agent produces any additional JSON, it does not contain Markdown formatting (bold, backtick code, headers) inside string values
